name: Goals Reference Valid Artifacts
description: Every VerificationGoal must reference a valid IMLModel via its target_artifact_id field.
rationale: A verification goal without a valid model reference is meaningless — there's nothing to verify against.

examples.passes: VG targets artifact 'a3' which is an IMLModel
examples.fails: VG targets artifact 'a7' which is a Diff, not an IMLModel
